intro.title: Welcome to AGV
intro.description: This course introduces you to the future of secure agentic development.

cards.title: The Agent-First Paradigm
cards.content: Shift from being a 'manual coder' to a 'Mission Control Architect'.

cards.title: Bridging the Trust Gap
cards.content: Autonomous agents require strict execution policies.

blocks.content: Before giving an AI agent the keys to your terminal, we must establish our workspace.

blocks.title: Pro Tip

blocks.title: Caution
